items.title: When The First Day Of School Turns WEIRD, What’s A Kid To Do? Newly Released Book Champions Authenticity
items.author: Cheyanne Abel
items.description: A new children's book, 'Darien Bluff and Creepy Stuff: Welcome to Thrillsville', encourages kids to embrace their individuality and be true to themselves, even if they are seen as 'odd' or 'creepy' by others.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The book is available for purchase on Amazon.com, indicating it is being distributed through this major online retailer.

items.title: Coach Dr. Tristina Anderson Launches New Book and Executive Coaching Program
items.author: Dr. Tristina Anderson
items.description: Dr. Tristina Anderson, a transformational coach and author, has announced the release of her memoir 'Resilience' and the upcoming launch of her 12-month executive coaching program 'Fearless Living: No Regrets'. The memoir chronicles her personal journey of overcoming a devastating health diagnosis, while the coaching program aims to help executives achieve 'full spectrum wealth' in their personal and professional lives.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article mentions that Dr. Anderson's memoir 'Resilience' is available on Amazon, which is a neutral statement about the book's distribution channel.
